subject: Re: Valdson raise
body:
ask him what he prefers.

----- Original Message ----
From: Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com>
To: "Epstein, Jeffrey" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, December 27, 2006 10:44:28 PM
Subject: Fw: Valdson raise

Plse advise + we did not give him a bonus at christmas..what if anything would you like to do

G



-----Original Message-----

From: "Rich Kahn" <rkahn@nysgmail.com>

Date: Tue, 2 Jan 2007 17:04:09 

To:"G Maxwell" <gmax1@mindspring.com>

Subject: re: Valdson raise



Currently we are paying Valdson 2,172.58 per month as his regular payroll.  In addition he receives 2,140.58 extra per month in addition to a food allowance of 20 Euros per day.  In November 2005 we gave Val son a 7% raise.  Please advise.
